'''鈭歠-l-r-ng''' ('''kafalrengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loo|loo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loo|loo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-l-r-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafalrengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalrengoko|thifalrengoko]] || [[word:jifalrengoko|jifalrengoko]] || [[word:shifalrengoko|shifalrengoko]] || [[word:kifalrengoko|kifalrengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufalrengoko|thuthufalrengoko]] || [[word:jujufalrengoko|jujufalrengoko]] || [[word:shushufalrengoko|shushufalrengoko]] || [[word:kukufalrengoko|kukufalrengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙falrengoko|th忙falrengoko]] || [[word:j忙falrengoko|j忙falrengoko]] || [[word:sh忙falrengoko|sh忙falrengoko]] || [[word:k忙falrengoko|k忙falrengoko]]
|-

|-
